productName: Nano Dopio - Caramel Fly (100mg THC;100mg CBG)(56.8g)
description: A lively infused shot with buttery, sweet caramel character, made for customers who want a fast, flavorful edible-style option. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
